titles.title: I Believe that He Gave His Life for Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I see the sunrise in the morning When I feel the wind blow across my face When I hear the sound of children playing I know it’s all a part of god’s amazing grace

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I believe there’s a place called heaven I believe in a place called Calvary I believe in a man his name is Jesus And I believe that he gave his life for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I was there the day my mamma went to heaven I held her hand as she closed her eyes to sleep I felt the power of ten thousand angels Take her soul away to be crowned at Jesus’ feet

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I believe there’s a place called heaven I believe in a place called Calvary I believe in a man whose name is Jesus And I believe that he gave his life for me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, and I believe that he gave his life for me
